svg.text: Five agents · structured JSON · grounded self-repair loop
Memory checks cache on the plan, not the noisy raw query. Author ships optimistically. Verifier listens to the live iframe and loops back on real runtime errors — Reflexion grounded in the browser.

g.text: top-K skills · our growing JS lib

text.tspan: Agent acts → environment returns real signal → agent reflects → retries.
Browser is the environment · runtime errors are the signal.
